post.subject: O2 giving away free SIM cards?
post.body: I dont know why it happened, but im certainly not going to complain about it either. I got 2 free O2 SIM cards in the post today. When i bought my O2 SIM card in December i paid £13 for it if i remember correctly. Now i hear they cost only a fiver, or less. Its a bit of a bitch, but its the way the market works. I guess if they're that cheap no one will want to buy them off me. Unless i find some dumb people who dont know how much they cost at the min... or i could try and sell them on Ebay. Having just checked Ebay it would appear there are some for sale at the minute on Ebay, some 1272 of them! Recently ended auctions have gone something like this: 2 O2 Sim Cards 300 Txts + WAP - Consecutive No.s 94/95! - £12.95 O2 Sim Pack 300 Free Texts Month 300 Wap Mins PAYG - £4.99 o2 sim cards with 300 free texts free p&p - £6.95 o2 sim card 300 free txts&wap+info - £7.00 But im not sure i wanna sell em, Might come in handy some time. Plus they got a cool(ish) number. 07*** 420***. Yeah 420. I think thats pretty cool. Well for now i will keep them. See what happens.
